title: Dioscorea gouanioides
taxonomy: Dioscorea gouanioides is a member of the family Dioscoreaceae, commonly known as the yam family. This plant is classified within the genus Dioscorea, which comprises a diverse group of species commonly referred to as yams or Dioscorea species. The species Dioscorea gouanioides is further classified into the order Dioscoreales, which is a group of flowering plants within the monocots. Dioscorea gouanioides is native to the tropical regions of South America, and its classification reflects its unique characteristics and adaptations to its environment. As a member of the Dioscoreaceae family, Dioscorea gouanioides shares similarities with other yam species in terms of its morphology and growth habits.

intro: Dioscorea gouanioides, also known as Gouania Dioscorea, is a species of flowering plant in the yam family (Dioscoreaceae). This plant has been found to exhibit various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been attributed to its use in traditional medicine for treating conditions such as arthritis and wounds. The bioactive constituents of Dioscorea gouanioides include glycosides, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
